question:
Report published by UNDP which compares countries based on educational levels of people, health status and per capita income, is
(1) Human Population Report
(2) Human Education Report
(3) Human Quality Report
(4) Human Development Report

Gross Domestic Product is defined as
(1) It is the value of goods and services produced during a year
(2) It is the value of all final goods and services produced within a country during a particular year
(3) The sum of the incomes that all individuals in the economy earned in a given year
(4) It is the sum of the expenditure by firms on new plant and equipment

options.1: It is the value of goods and services produced during a year
options.2: It is the value of all final goods and services produced within a country during a particular year
options.3: The sum of the incomes that all individuals in the economy earned in a given year
options.4: It is the sum of the expenditure by firms on new plant and equipment

(1) RBI
